title: Agent Handoff
description: Structured contract passed between pipeline stages. Enforces trust boundaries and declares permissions at each transition.

handoff_id.description: Unique ID for this handoff, used in audit logs.

objective.description: What the receiving agent is expected to accomplish.

inputs.description: Payload — may include refs to artifact files, not raw untrusted content.

constraints.description: Explicit rules the receiving agent must respect for this handoff.

raw_untrusted_content_included.description: Must be false for all handoffs except Reader input.

allowed_tools.description: Tools the receiving agent may use for this handoff only.

approval_required.description: If true, a human approval gate must be passed before the receiving agent acts.

expected_deliverables.description: Output artifacts or blocks the receiving agent must produce.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions the receiving agent should surface in its output.
